title: Boat Rocket
body:
Use Boat Rocket to quickly cross the seas with the boat
 


   This rocket at the bot takes up one space (like mobs)

   When boat rocked broken (take enough damage) , it drops itself as item.

   Relase W button for better rotation control

 ![boat rocket](https://i.ibb.co/pKRqnLw/Animation.gif)
